§6Fluix Crystal§f

§aThe hybrid crystal — Certus + Nether + Redstone.§f

The §bFluix Crystal§f is the §9core crafting reagent§f for nearly every Applied Energistics 2 recipe.

§6How to Make It§f:
§b•§f §bCharged Certus Quartz Crystal§f + §bNether Quartz§f dropped into water
§b•§f The crystals fuse into a Fluix Crystal when submerged
§b•§f Optionally add a §bRedstone Dust§f to the water to control the conversion (Redstone speeds the process)

§6Uses§f:
§b•§f Required in §9every ME cable§f recipe (Fluix Crystal + glass)
§b•§f Required in §9every processor§f recipe
§b•§f §bStorage Cells§f, §bFormation Cores§f, §bAnnihilation Cores§f, §bEnergy Cells§f, all terminals
§b•§f Most advanced AE2 components

§6Strategic Role§f:
Fluix Crystals are §ethe gating reagent§f for AE2 progression. You will need §ehundreds§f of them before your ME network is functional. Build a §bdedicated Fluix production pool§f.

§eTip§f: A single §b1×1×1 water source block§f can convert stacks of crystals. Set up an automated §bdrop-into-water§f production line.
